tool.name: getorf
tool.summary: Extract stop-bounded forward ORFs from nucleotide records

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `getorf` extracts stop-bounded open reading frames from nucleotide input using the shared EMBOSS-RS translation foundations. The current v1 policy searches only forward frames 1-3, starts ORFs at `ATG`, and ends each ORF at the first in-frame stop codon, including the stop codon in the extracted nucleotide output.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The tool accepts one local nucleotide input path. Protein-classified input is rejected. Ambiguous or unsupported codons are not expanded in the first release.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The tool emits one nucleotide FASTA record per detected ORF in stable record and frame order. Output identifiers are suffixed as `<accession>.orfN.frameF.<start>-<end>`, and descriptions are annotated with the reported frame and coordinates.

sections.title: Legacy Context
sections.content: This acceptance anchor keeps one historical-style `getorf` invocation in view and compares the EMBOSS-RS FASTA payload against a committed expected output. The governed comparison validates the first-release stop-bounded forward-ORF policy on the committed nucleotide fixture.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `emboss-rs getorf`. Current validation covers ORF extraction from the committed stop-bounded fixture, stable coordinate encoding in identifiers, and clear rejection of non-nucleotide input.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The first release supports forward frames only, requires `ATG` starts, and stops at the first in-frame stop codon. It does not expose alternative start codons, minimum-length filtering, reverse-complement search, or alternative genetic codes.

artifacts.label: Stop-bounded ORF fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed nucleotide fixture containing two forward stop-bounded ORFs for deterministic ORF extraction validation.

examples.title: Extract forward stop-bounded ORFs
examples.description: Scans the committed nucleotide fixture for `ATG`-started forward ORFs and emits each stop-bounded nucleotide span as FASTA.

expected_outputs.label: Extracted ORF FASTA output
expected_outputs.description: A stable FASTA rendering of the extracted stop-bounded forward ORFs.
